changeSet.author: labsolution
changeSet.comment: Create a soft-reference, append-only archive for the exact analyzer evidence that a downgrade of LIS-97 cannot represent in the legacy schema. The table is normally empty and is deliberately retained across rollback.

changeSet.author: labsolution
changeSet.comment: Make the downgrade archive immutable. On rollback, capture byte-complete evidence from staging, the current result, and every result version before deterministically clamping only the two live tables to the legacy 80/40 limits. The archive remains available for recovery and audit after older rollback steps drop or narrow their source columns.
